title: Cooler conditions will assist firefighters
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"OUDTSHOORN NEWS -  Cooler weather conditions are forecast for Oudtshoorn today, Tuesday 23 December and are expected to assist firefighting efforts adjacent to the Military Base, Lategansvlei to Matjiesrivier.","html":"OUDTSHOORN NEWS - Cooler weather conditions are forecast for Oudtshoorn today, Tuesday 23 December and are expected to assist firefighting efforts adjacent to the Military Base, Lategansvlei to Matjiesrivier."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The mountain fire has diminished significantly overnight, particularly along the northern fire line above the Matjiesrivier and Voorbedacht farms."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"This area will continue to be closely monitored, with specific focus on the Schoemanspoort area.","html":"This area will continue to be closely monitored, with specific focus on the Schoemanspoort area."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The south-eastern fire line, east of Lategansvlei, remains active and will be addressed on foot this morning by Garden Route District Municipality","html":"The south-eastern fire line, east of Lategansvlei, remains active and will be addressed on foot this morning by Garden Route District Municipality"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Fire and Rescue Services, in collaboration with the Eden Working on Fire teams.","html":"Fire and Rescue Services, in collaboration with the Eden Working on Fire teams."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"If you spot a veld or wildfire, please report it immediately to the GRDM Emergency Call Centre on 044 805 5071 or via WhatsApp on 081 709 5193.","html":"If you spot a veld or wildfire, please report it immediately to the GRDM Emergency Call Centre on 044 805 5071 or via WhatsApp on 081 709 5193."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
